name: code-behavioral-guidelines
description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

interface.shortDescription: Guidelines for simpler, more careful coding-agent work
interface.longDescription: Behavioral guidelines that help coding agents think before coding, keep changes simple, make surgical edits, and define verifiable success criteria.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpathy-style coding guidelines for this task.
Review this change for overcomplication and unnecessary edits.
